title: Lightning
summary: Procedurally generated lightning bolts rendered on HTML Canvas using recursive branching paths and binary character glyphs.
description: An interactive lightning system that generates randomised bolt paths using recursive branching segments. Each strike is rendered character by character using '0' and '1' glyphs on an HTML Canvas, producing a stylised binary aesthetic. Branches split from the main bolt at random angles with decreasing intensity. Includes a screen flash on each strike and responds to mouse click events to fire targeted bolts at the cursor position.
